title: infinant loop in recursive function causes crash

features.name: recursive function with divide by zero in arguments
features.description: Code should include a recursive function where the recursive call has a divide-by-zero expression as an argument, causing undefined value propagation that prevents base case from being reached

features.name: localparam evaluation of recursive function with zero width
features.description: Code should include a localparam that calls a recursive function with a zero-valued width parameter, which causes divide-by-zero and undefined behavior in the recursion

features.name: ternary operator with undefined condition in recursive call
features.description: Code should include a recursive function using ternary operator with an expression that evaluates to undefined due to divide-by-zero, causing the condition to always evaluate to false and prevent termination
